text.heos.maxPasswordChars: §6Password can be at most %d characters long!
text.heos.minPasswordChars: §6Password must be at least %d characters long!
text.heos.onlinePlayerLogin: §aYou are using an online account. No login required.
text.heos.authServiceUnavailable:
§cPremium authentication is temporarily unavailable.
Please try again later.
text.heos.loginFailureLock:
§cToo many failed login attempts.
Please try again in %d seconds.
text.heos.whitelistKick: You are not on the whitelist.
text.heos.whitelistDeniedLog: Player is not on the whitelist: %s
text.heos.banIpMessage:
Your IP has been banned: %s
Expires: %s
text.heos.bindOldNameRequired: §cPlease specify the old account name. Usage: /heos bind request <old account>
text.heos.bindNewNameRequired: §cPlease specify the new account name. Usage: /heos bind accept <new account>
text.heos.bindAlreadyBound: §cYour account is already bound to another account.
text.heos.bindPendingExists: §eYou already have a pending binding request. Wait for the old account to confirm.
text.heos.bindRequestFailed: §cBinding request failed. Please try again later.
text.heos.bindRequestSent: §aBinding request sent to %s. Tell that player to use /heos bind accept <your name> to confirm.
text.heos.bindAccepted: §aAccepted binding from %s! They will now use your account data on next login.
text.heos.bindNotPending: §eThis binding record is not in pending state.
text.heos.bindNoPendingForYou: §eYou have no pending binding requests. Use /heos bind status to check.
text.heos.nameAmbiguous: §c'%s' matches multiple accounts (Premium/Offline). Please use 'Premium_%s' or 'Offline_%s'.
text.heos.nameAmbiguousHint: §eThis name matches multiple accounts. Use the prefixed name.
